'''[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] Ism Oolos''' was a [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] doctor who gained some fame for his research into the [[Death Seed]] plague. Years later, he was one of the doctors to try and treat [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] after her [[coomb spore]] infection.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''
